articles.title: Trump said his blockade would cause Iran's oil industry to 'explode' this week. Why that won't happen
articles.summary: The U.S. and Iran are locked in a standoff that will only break when one side decides it can no longer tolerate the pain. Who will move is unclear.

articles.title: Apple's stock has gone nowhere for 6 months. Traders expect a wild ride Thursday night
articles.summary: Implied volatility in the stock suggests a 3.5% swing after earnings tonight, compared to an average move of just 1.8% following the last four quarterly reports.

articles.title: Tariff refunds begin on Monday. These retailers are due big paydays
articles.summary: U.S. importers, such as Walmart and Target, could be in line for billions in tariff refunds as the government launches its claims filing portal on Monday.

articles.title: Will rates go higher in Europe this week? Central banks confront stagflation threat
articles.summary: The European Central Bank and Bank of England are expected to hold their nerve and stand pat on rates this month.

articles.title: U.S. senators ban themselves from prediction markets trading

articles.title: Trump taps Nicole Saphier for surgeon general after pulling Casey Means nomination
